overview: SHOOT SENSE AI is an ultra-futuristic AI photography planning platform (Year 2258 style) that empowers photographers to plan shoots, generate AI pose ideas, chat with an AI photography expert, and save/reuse shoot templates — all wrapped in a dark cyberpunk UI with 3D elements and GSAP animations.
features: AI Photography Planner with shoot creation and management
Pose Creator with AI-generated pose ideas and personal library
AI Chat Assistant powered by OpenAI for photography guidance
Shoot Planner with save, reuse, and template cloning
Internet Identity authentication and user profiles
Ultra-futuristic 3D UI with GSAP animations and neon cyan/purple cyberpunk aesthetic
Glassmorphism cards and Three.js animated background
Fully responsive mobile and desktop layout
